title: Settings Screen
problem: There is no settings screen — players cannot toggle haptics, mute future audio, reset their save, or view app version. This is a hard requirement for App Store submission (Apple requires a data/reset option) and for player preference.
analysis: No settings system exists. useHaptics.ts (feat-048) needs a hapticsEnabled flag. save/load (feat-050) needs a clearSave() entry point exposed to the user. Apple App Store requires apps to provide a way to reset/delete user data. App version is in app.json and accessible via expo-constants. The settings screen is a lightweight screen with 4 concerns: haptics toggle, audio toggle (placeholder), reset progress, about.
implementation: 1. src/store/settingsStore.ts — SettingsState: { hapticsEnabled: boolean, audioEnabled: boolean, onboardingDone: boolean, hasSeenFirstBoss: boolean, zoomLevel: 0|1|2, hasSeenGhostEchoHint: boolean, loaded: boolean }. Actions: setHaptics, setAudio, setOnboardingDone, markFirstBossSeen, setZoomLevel(z: 0|1|2), markGhostEchoHintSeen(), loadFromDisk(): Promise<void>. Each mutating action calls saveSettings() with the full SettingsData object (all 6 fields). loadFromDisk() calls loadSettings() and applies defaults for optional fields (zoomLevel ?? 1, hasSeenGhostEchoHint ?? false). 2. src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx — sections: AUDIO/HAPTICS (toggle rows with Switch), DANGER ZONE (RESET PROGRESS button → Alert.alert confirmation), ABOUT (version from expo-constants). 3. App.tsx — 'settings' in GameScreen type. ⚙ icon on main menu header. 4. SettingsScreen RESET PROGRESS: clearSave() + reset stores to initial state + setScreen('grid'). 5. GridScreen: reads savedZoom = useSettingsStore(s => s.zoomLevel) to initialize zoom state. Calls persistZoom (setZoomLevel) on every zoom change (buttons + pinch). 6. useHaptics.ts reads hapticsEnabled before every haptic call.

decisions.decision: Settings persisted via AsyncStorage in persistence.ts (SettingsData interface)
decisions.rationale: Settings are user preferences that must survive app restarts; AsyncStorage is the correct persistence layer for this game.

decisions.decision: settingsStore exposes individual toggles and markX actions
decisions.rationale: Granular actions are easier to call from UI components than a generic setField action; each action also triggers saveSettings automatically.

decisions.decision: BMAD S3: hasSeenCodexHint boolean added — tracks whether player dismissed the Codex first-open hint; markCodexHintSeen action; persisted in SettingsData
decisions.rationale: One-time hints should be persisted so they never re-appear after dismissal even across app restarts.

successCriteria: Haptics toggle disables/enables haptic feedback immediately. Reset progress wipes save and returns to fresh game. App version number visible. Settings survive a save reset. Zoom level persists across app restarts. Ghost Echo hint shows exactly once when graveyard is non-empty.
knownLimitations: No per-haptics-event granularity (e.g. can't disable only crit haptics)
Audio toggle has no effect in v1

userGuide:
Access Settings from the ⚙ button on the main menu.

**Haptics:** Toggle vibration feedback on/off. Takes effect immediately.

**Zoom:** Your preferred grid zoom (small/medium/large) is saved automatically — the dungeon grid opens at your last zoom level after every restart.

**Reset Progress:** Permanently deletes all saved run data (XP, level, stash, graveyard). Your settings (haptics, zoom, tutorial flags) are preserved. Requires confirmation before executing.

**App version** is displayed in the About section.

publicInterface.name: useSettingsStore
publicInterface.description: { hapticsEnabled, audioEnabled, onboardingDone, hasSeenFirstBoss, zoomLevel: 0|1|2, hasSeenGhostEchoHint, loaded } — persisted to @d2game_settings_v1

publicInterface.name: setZoomLevel
publicInterface.description: Updates and persists the player's preferred grid zoom level

publicInterface.name: markGhostEchoHintSeen
publicInterface.description: Marks the one-time Ghost Echo ambient hint as seen; prevents it from showing again

publicInterface.name: loadFromDisk
publicInterface.description: Loads SettingsData from AsyncStorage and hydrates all fields with safe defaults

publicInterface.name: SettingsScreen
publicInterface.description: Haptics toggle, audio toggle, reset progress, about section with version number

codeSnippets.label: settingsStore — full state shape
codeSnippets.snippet:
export interface SettingsState {
  hapticsEnabled:       boolean
  audioEnabled:         boolean
  onboardingDone:       boolean
  hasSeenFirstBoss:     boolean
  zoomLevel:            0 | 1 | 2
  hasSeenGhostEchoHint: boolean
  loaded:               boolean
  // actions...
  setZoomLevel:          (z: 0 | 1 | 2) => void
  markGhostEchoHintSeen: () => void
  loadFromDisk:          () => Promise<void>
}

codeSnippets.label: setZoomLevel — mutate + persist
loadFromDisk — with optional field defaults
GridScreen — zoom initialized from settingsStore
